note_text:
*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Abscess to Right cervical / Measures 1.6 cm x 1.0 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serous, light. No odor noted. Treatment: Pack with iodoform gauze daily.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right cervical wound site, rates 7/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Abscess abscess Right cervical measures 1.6 cm x 1.0 cm x 0.7 cm.
  Wound bed: 39% slough, 61% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: light. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Abscess abscess Right cervical — not improving.
Plan: Physician notified of wound progression. Nutritional consult ordered.
